title: SNC Trust Declares Largest Distribution in its History
summary: Nome, Alaska | November 6, 2020 The Trustees of the SNC Trust are pleased to declare a Heritage Distribution of $8.45 per Trust Unit (or $845.00 for those with 100 Trust Units) to all beneficiaries of record as of November 6, 2020. An Elders Benefit Distribution of $1,000 per Elder has also been dec...

title: SNC TEMPORARILY CLOSES ANCHORAGE OFFICE
summary: November 5, 2020 – The Sitnasuak Anchorage office is currently closed due to COVID precautions and is tentatively scheduled to reopen on November 18th, 2020, at 8 a.m. AKDT. Employees are working remotely during this period and are available via email and by phone. Employees can be reached directly...
